ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the artifact (e.g., Archive Descriptions) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artifact */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the artifact */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artifact */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the artifact was last updated */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the artifact */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file associated with the artifact */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .pdf, .jpg) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type (e.g., image, document) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the artifact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifacts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifacts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., institution, organization) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was left */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the activity was on */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, comment, upload) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the reporting period */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the reporting period */,
  "total_uploads" INTEGER /* Total number of uploads for the reporting period */,
  "top_artifact" INTEGER /* ID of the most viewed artifact */,
  "top_author" INTEGER /* ID of the most active author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artifact_tags" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission", "artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_metadata" (
  "institutional_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institutional_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_metadata_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)
